title: Dashboard & Reports
content:
The CloudDesk Dashboard gives a real-time overview of your support operations.

**Key Metrics Displayed:**
- Open Tickets (by priority)
- Avg First Response Time
- Avg Resolution Time
- SLA Breach Rate (%)
- Agent Performance (tickets closed per agent)
- CSAT Score (if surveys enabled)

**Custom Reports:**
1. Click 'Reports' in the sidebar.
2. Choose a template: Ticket Volume, SLA Compliance, Agent Performance, Customer Satisfaction.
3. Set date range and filters.
4. Export as CSV or PDF.

**Scheduled Reports:**
Automate report delivery: Reports → Schedule → Choose frequency (daily/weekly/monthly) → Enter recipient emails.

**Dashboard Widgets:**
Customize your Dashboard layout by clicking 'Edit Layout' — drag and resize widgets to your preference.
